Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}Sorry it's so messy in here. This won't take long.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}I actually have a favor to ask of you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}I got him when I was living with my mom and he's been with me ever since, so I decided to bring him here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}If, for some reason, I don't make it back here in the future, then this little guy will be all alone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}Could you help look after him if that happens, {f 4 1}-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}Of course. I have you guys with me, so I won't go down easily.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}It was the same with my mom. Everything happened so suddenly...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}Sorry I'm bringing this up out of nowhere. I know it's a bit of an unreasonable request.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}You even came to see me today. You look out for the ones around you, so I'm sure he'd be happy with you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}Because you're our leader, and you're basically already an adult. I know how capable you are.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}You even came to see me today. You look out for the ones around you, so I'm sure he'd be happy with you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}So please, I can even provide a little something as thanks.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}I'll give you all my allowance and the rest of my New Year's money... And I'll give you all the comics here, plus whatever else you want![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}But when that happens, you better listen to him, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}Hey, did you hear that, Hamburger? {f 4 1}-san complimented you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}You think so? Mom used to always laugh about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}The night he came home with me, we had hamburgers for dinner, so that's why.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}My favorite would be omelet rice, but hamburgers are a close second.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}The night he came home with me, we had hamburgers for dinner, so that's why.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}But, you know what? I think my mom laughed and said the same thing back then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}Anyways, thank you so much. That's a big relief.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}Sorry again for the disturbance. Could you apologize to everyone else for me?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}It's getting late, so I'm going to bed soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}Um, actually... can I ask you one more thing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}They always come up to me for a casual chat, and they treat me like a normal person.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}Sure, there were plenty of adults who showed concern for me, but I feel like the people here are a little different...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}And you came to check in on me again today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}But why? Why does everyone here care about what happens to me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}I only just joined, but you already think of me as one of your own?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}I think that level of casualness works better for me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}No one's treated me as normally as this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}...I guess that was a weird question, wasn't it? Sorry, don't mind me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}...I don't know if I'll be able to fully repay you for your kindness, but I'll do my best.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}Thank you, and I'm sorry. I won't let you down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I left the silent hallway[n]and returned to my room...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0} has improved[n]after accepting Amada's desperate request...[n]{f 1 1}
